page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8is-4x.16xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing Intel Xeon 6462C processors operating at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. The system is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

For acceleration, the instance integrates four NVIDIA L20 GPUs based on the Ada Lovelace architecture, delivering a combined total of 192 GB of VRAM. Networking capabilities include a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps. This instance does not include any local storage, requiring external block storage solutions for data persistence.

Given the density of its four NVIDIA L20 GPUs and dedicated Intel Xeon processors, this instance is designed for parallel computing workloads. It is suitable for deep learning inference, medium-scale AI model training, high-performance computing, and graphics-intensive rendering tasks. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the hardware profile offers a high density of GPU resources and dedicated CPU cores, making it a specialized option for organizations needing multi-GPU acceleration without the overhead of local storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8is-4x.16xlarge is a dedicated GPU-accelerated server instance designed for compute-intensive parallel workloads. Running on the KVM hypervisor, it features 64 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 6462C processors at 3.3 GHz, paired with 512.0 GB of system memory. Acceleration is driven by four NVIDIA L20 Ada Lovelace GPUs, providing a total of 192 GB of VRAM. The instance offers a high-speed network interface with a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps, though it lacks local storage, necessitating network-attached storage. This hardware configuration is optimized for deep learning inference, AI model training, and high-performance computing tasks requiring significant GPU memory and dedicated x86_64 CPU resources.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8is-4x.16xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 512 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA L20 GPUs with 192 GB VRAM for AI and HPC workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8is-4x.16xlarge features 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 512 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA L20 GPUs for high-performance parallel computing.
tagline: A dedicated multi-GPU acceleration platform featuring four NVIDIA L20 GPUs and sixty-four physical processor cores for intensive parallel computing workloads.
bullet_points: Four NVIDIA L20 Ada Lovelace GPUs providing 192 GB of total VRAM
Sixty-four dedicated physical Intel Xeon 6462C CPU cores at 3.3 GHz
512 GB of system memory delivering 8.0 GB of RAM per core
64 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer
Designed for deep learning inference, AI training, and parallel computing
